title: JT-GappleCooldown
description: simple plugin to add cooldown to golden apples and enchanted apples
body:
![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/McXFCPB1/images/841f8d153bff5bac3abe7dc8c0759f618641e42f.png)

・Add cooldown when eating an enchanted golden apple

・Add cooldown when eating a golden apple

・Very light weight

・All messages are fully customizable

<details>
<summary>Screenshots</summary>

                                                    Message when eating an apple
![eating](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/McXFCPB1/images/5e6fb356645eaaa40e3e951845a69bc43fa951fa.png)

                                         Message when trying to eat an apple on cooldown
![cooldown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/McXFCPB1/images/476c40cf52949659aa90af44f36bc012578cfe55.png)


</details>

![PLACEHOLDER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/McXFCPB1/images/73697777013c2e0f413715fe22ab4d260527163f.png)

Permissions:

・jtcooldown.bypass (Allows the player to ignore the cooldown)

Placeholders: (Requires PlaceHolderApi)

・%jtgapplecooldown_restante% (Player cooldown time remaining)

<details>
<summary>Default Config</summary>

# Author: JUXT12

#enchanted golden apple cooldown
enchanted_cooldown_seconds: 60

# Golden Apples Cooldown
normal_cooldown_seconds: 30

# messages
enchanted_cooldown_message: "&6[JT-GappleCooldown] &cYou must wait %seconds% seconds before eating another enchanted apple."
normal_cooldown_message: "&6[JT-GappleCooldown] &cYou must wait %seconds% seconds before eating another golden apple."
eat_message: "&6[JT-GappleCooldown] &aYou have eaten an apple. You must wait %seconds% seconds before eating another enchanted apple."
enchanted_cooldown_message_while_eating: "&6[JT-GappleCooldown] &cYou are on cooldown. You must wait %seconds% seconds before eating another enchanted apple."
normal_cooldown_message_while_eating: "&6[JT-GappleCooldown] &cYou are on cooldown. You must wait %seconds% seconds before eating another golden apple."

</details>

![using](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/McXFCPB1/images/4bfc24d677cb07d7279ed95bb1a48562f38b2265.png)

1. mc.bycraft.net (Version: 1.8 - 1.20)

![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/McXFCPB1/images/965a97ea8e8810ab644d7e3b65a5e400367be031.png)
